fields.label: Card 1 Text
fields.name: card_1_text
fields.default_value: All therapists on the platform charge the same fee, so you can focus on what matters most - areas of specialism, lived experience, cultural sensitivity, and, above all, who you feel most at ease with.

fields.label: Card 2 Text
fields.name: card_2_text
fields.default_value: Our therapists come from diverse cultural backgrounds and offer sessions in multiple languages, including English, French, Greek, Portuguese, Farsi, and Hungarian.

fields.label: Card 3 Text
fields.name: card_3_text
fields.default_value: For many people, being able to work in their first language or with someone who understands their cultural context can make a real difference. We see the therapeutic relationship as central to the work.

fields.label: Bottom Statement
fields.name: bottom_text
fields.default_value:
Taking time to choose someone who feels like a good fit is not only encouraged -<br class="lg:block hidden">
 it’s part of the process
